points.label: Feedback dialog: attach a screenshot and send
points.summary: Feedback submissions can now carry screenshots. With Feedback mode on, ask anything, then press Feedback under the reply. The dialog has a new '📷 Add screenshot' button: attach 1-2 images (screenshots or photos), see them as removable thumbnails, and send with a short comment. PASS: 'Feedback sent ✓' appears, and the entry in the account panel's Feedback view shows the images as thumbnails under your comment (each opens full size in a new tab).

actions.text: Make sure Feedback mode is ON, then send any quick question and use the Feedback button under the reply.
What is the capital of Sweden?

points.label: Feedback thread: image-only reply
points.summary: Thread replies can carry screenshots too — including with NO text. Open the account panel → Feedback, pick the entry from the previous point (or any entry), attach an image in its reply box via '📷 Add screenshot', leave the text empty, and press Send reply. PASS: the reply lands in the thread showing just the thumbnail; withdrawing an entry still removes everything.

actions.text: Use the reply box of an existing entry: image only, no text.
